Module com.hack23.cia.web
Package com.hack23.cia.web.impl.ui.application.views.contracts

Interface IAdminView

All Superinterfaces:
IView, java.io.Serializable, com.vaadin.navigator.View
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractAdminView, AdminAgencyView, AdminApplicationConfigurationView, AdminApplicationEventsView, AdminApplicationSessionView, AdminCountryView, AdminDataQualityView, AdminDataSummaryView, AdminEmailView, AdminLanguageView, AdminMonitoringView, AdminPortalView, AdminUseraccountView, AgentOperationView
public interface IAdminView extends IView
The Interface IAdminView. Contract for administrative views in the application.
